theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The brand is a luxury heritage superfood platform emphasizing the Silk Route. It requires a grounded, authentic, warm, and highly premium editorial aesthetic. Dark tech modes feel too clinical; we need parchment, sand, ivory, and metallic gold accents to convey history and premium quality, akin to Aesop or Forest Essentials.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Editorial bento grid. Mix spanning columns (col-span-8 and col-span-4) with generous gap-8 or gap-12 to create asymmetrical, magazine-like layouts.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Avoid heavy shadows. Use 1px solid borders (#E2D9CD) to separate sections, creating an architectural, print-like structure.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or minimal rounded-sm (2px). Luxury feels sharp and deliberate, not bubbly.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis is MANDATORY for a premium feel.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images should have a slow, subtle scale effect (scale-105 duration-1000 ease-out). Text links should use a delicate underline expansion.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: All page transitions and modal opens should be slow (duration-500) and smooth.
motion_and_interaction.parallax: Use Framer Motion to create a slight parallax effect on the background texture/map versus the foreground product images.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2C2A26] text-[#F9F6F0] hover:bg-[#B5955C] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4. Secondary: border border-[#C5BAA9] text-[#2C2A26] hover:bg-[#F1EBE1] rounded-none px-8 py-4.
components.navigation: Sticky header, bg-[#F9F6F0]/90 backdrop-blur-md, minimal logo, centered links, cart/account on right. Top banner with 'AFGHANISTAN — IRAN — TURKEY — INDIA — MOROCCO' marquee.
components.product_cards: No borders, no shadows. Large image with 4:5 aspect ratio (object-cover). Minimal typography below: Product Name (Serif), Origin (Overline), Price (Sans-serif).
components.nut_butter_builder: Multi-step interactive configurator. Step 1: Base (Almonds/Cashews). Step 2: Roast (Raw/Roasted). Step 3: Flavors (Saffron/Honey). Step 4: Texture. Use large tactile imagery for each selection. Dynamic price counter fixed at the bottom.
components.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn components. Clean, high-density layout. Keep the sidebar warm (#F9F6F0) with Manrope font to maintain brand consistency even in the backend.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='builder-step-1', data-testid='checkout-form-submit').

hero_and_story.description: Vintage sepia map for Silk Route background
Cream silk fabric texture for section backgrounds
Torn parchment for editorial overlapping elements

products.description: Gourmet stuffed dates with pistachios and almonds
Assorted dried fruits on a white plate

nut_butter_builder.description: Jar of creamy artisan almond butter with wooden spoon
Homemade nut butter with spices on a board
Jar of almond butter on raw nuts

corporate_gifting.description: Luxury neutral gift box with ribbon

icons.instructions: Use light weight for a delicate, refined luxury feel. Do not use chunky solid icons.
